llm_eval.notes: C09 共有repo-context resolver(全下流の security foundation)。py_compile OK、test_runtime/test_coverageがroot解決/id導出/path guard/feature contextを網羅exercise。frontmatter詳細完備(write-scope:none)。設計良: root解決を--repo-root>trusted env>git toplevel>cwd markerの明示順にし、host宣言$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIRとrealpath不一致なら曖昧候補を採らずPolicyError、_parse_github_remoteがhost完全一致でevilgithub.com/github.com.exampleの部分一致誤認を排除、guard_relative_path()がabsolute/drive/NUL/'..'/realpath commonpath containmentを未作成対象含め検査、validate_feature_contextがfield exact-set+型+RFC3339 tz+architecture_ref存在を強制。PolicyError(exit2)/UsageError(exit1)分離明快。減点smell: derive_repository_id(159)と_valid_repository_id(211)でtop-level済のhashlib/reを関数内再import(冗長dead import)。重大欠陥なし
